findings.description: PascalCase class name `FixedLengthConvertorSetting` is missing from s6 hints. Only the camelCase bean name `fixedLengthConvertorSetting` is present, but the class name appears explicitly in the XML configuration as `class="nablarch.core.dataformat.convertor.FixedLengthConvertorSetting"` and would be the natural search term for users looking up how to configure this component.
findings.source_evidence: XML config in 固定長ファイルの準備 section: `<component name="fixedLengthConvertorSetting" class="nablarch.core.dataformat.convertor.FixedLengthConvertorSetting">`

findings.description: The concrete example table showing 符号付数値/符号無数値 data representation is omitted. The source provides a specific format scenario (フィールド長10桁、パディング文字'0'、小数点必要、符号位置固定、正の符号不要) and shows exactly how values map to test data strings (12345→0000012345, -12.34→-000012.34). This concrete example helps AI agents give precise guidance on test data format, beyond the general rule that is captured.
findings.source_evidence: Source note under 固定長ファイルの準備: 「以下に、データ型が符号付数値の場合に表したい値とその表現方法の例を示す。（フォーマット定義：フィールド長10桁、パディング文字'0'、小数点必要、符号位置固定、正の符号不要）」 followed by table showing 12345→0000012345, -12.34→-000012.34
